A Letter to Our Seniors

You walked through these halls and turned them into something sacred. Your laughter echoed in every corridor, your passion lit up every stage, and your friendships wove themselves into the very fabric of who we are.

Today we gather not to say goodbye — but to celebrate every moment that made these years unforgettable. Because the story doesn't end here. This ends. We don't.

— With love, from your juniors 💛
